## Description
To ensure safe deployments, especially when database schema migrations are involved, we need to automate the backup and restore processes for IndexedDB, as well as the deployment rollback mechanism.

## Deliverables
- [ ] Automated script for backing up IndexedDB before deployment.
- [ ] Automated script for restoring IndexedDB from a backup.
- [ ] Automated deployment rollback script (e.g., reverting to the previous tag).
- [ ] Updated release runbook with automation instructions.

## Owner
DevOps Team
